summary: Agent attempted to add a `retryWithBackoff` utility function to `src/utils/shell-test-runner.ts` with exponential backoff logic (max 3 attempts, base 500ms, 2x multiplier) and corresponding tests. The attempt was marked successful, but the transcript shows the agent encountered tool availability confusion during initial file reading—it tried to use `file_read` which wasn't available, then attempted `search` and `file_edit` before recognizing a mismatch between allowed tool categories (read, search, analyze) and available tools (test_runner, file_write, file_edit). The actual implementation details are not shown in the transcript, only that the test result was marked as passed.

risks.description: Tool availability mismatch—agent attempted tools (file_read, search, file_edit) against stated allowed categories (read, search, analyze), creating confusion about actual available toolset
risks.mitigation: Clarify actual available tools at session start; reconcile tool documentation with runtime capabilities

risks.mitigation: Full implementation code should be captured in future transcripts for verification
